Tech Stack:

React — the JavaScript framework we're using to build the UI (all the .jsx files)
Vite — the tool that runs and builds your React app (npm run dev)
JavaScript (JS) — the programming language (React is built on top of JS)
CSS — for styling
Pinata — the service that uploads files to IPFS
IPFS — decentralized file storage
Cardano/Lace — the blockchain and wallet
Blockfrost — the API that talks to the Cardano blockchain
localStorage — temporary browser storage to save uploaded note records
